instruction: Build a FastAPI application for a URL shortener service. The API should: (1) accept a long URL and optional custom alias, return a short URL; (2) redirect from short URL to original; (3) track click count per short URL; (4) provide analytics endpoint returning total clicks, unique IPs, and referrer breakdown. Include rate limiting (100 requests/minute per IP) and input validation (valid URLs only).

constraints: Use in-memory storage for URLs and analytics
Generate short codes using base62 encoding of a counter or random bytes
Rate limiting should use a sliding window counter
Analytics endpoint should accept a date range filter
Include proper error responses with JSON error body
